name: project-structure
description: This will be helpful to understand where each folder and file is located and where to read or create files.

# Project Structure

Read and explore the project structure.

## File

The file that includes the project structure in case you want to explore it is the [project-structure.md](project-structure.md).

## Before and after usage

In order for the file to be updated often, run the command `tree` before and after usage in the terminal. Then paste the output in the markdown file [project-structure.md](project-structure.md) in between the ``` ```.
